rows.title: atallent97
rows.content_markdown:
> Second person Jackson ever texted on Snapchat — a substantive high school friendship that faded by late 2025.

## Snapchat Engagement
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total Snaps | 125 |
| Sent | 18 |
| Received | 107 |
| Total Messages | 433 |
| Message Date Range | 2020-09 – 2025-12 |
| Snap Ratio | 1:5.94 sent:received |

## Relationship Profile
- **Era**: Both — began Sep 2020, maintained through most of Auburn, ended late 2025
- **Type**: Chat-dominant (messages far exceed snaps)
- **Current Status**: Dormant — last message Dec 2025
- **Dynamic**: One of the most message-heavy relationships in the dataset (433 messages over 5+ years) but very few snaps from Jackson's side. The conversation opened Sep 2020 with a substantive paragraph about Jackson's ideal school day — establishing a thoughtful, text-based relationship from the start. Relationship faded naturally by end of 2025 with no resumed contact.

## Group Chats Shared
- None documented

## Notes
Real name unknown. The Sep 2020 start makes this the second person Jackson ever messaged. The high message count with substantive content (school essays, personal thoughts documented in export) contrasts with near-zero snap engagement from Jackson. atallent97 sent 107 snaps with only 18 back — a lopsided snap ratio combined with genuine text depth. Relationship is considered dormant as of Dec 2025.

## See Also
- **Relationship Map**
- **People Index**
- **Communication Patterns**

## Full Profile
- **Anna**

## Relationship Profile
- **Era**: Both — Oct 2020 is nearly account creation
- **Type**: Snap-dominant, heavily receiver-skewed
- **Current Status**: Active — last message April 9 2026
- **Dynamic**: Trey sends 4.9x more snaps to Jackson than Jackson sends back — the most lopsided major relationship in the dataset. Jackson rarely initiates with Trey. Despite being current roommates and next year's roommates, the snap data suggests Trey carries the streak. Low message count (138 over 6 years) with an active status indicates the relationship runs on snaps, not conversation.

## Group Chats Shared
- Aubbies sex slaves (with Brock Adams + curtain_kid + Brittain Snyder)

## Notes
The Oct 2020 start date makes this Jackson's longest-running Snapchat relationship. Current situation: living together, planning to room again next year, but there is noted tension currently. The snap ratio (1:4.87) is the starkest imbalance among high-volume contacts — Trey initiates consistently while Jackson rarely reciprocates at the snap level. Trey dated Emma Williard for 1.5 years, who is now Jackson's current romantic interest — a notable relational dynamic.
